text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Morning, Trainer. ♪ Ahhh, I'm feeling real good
today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I slept so well last night I can hardly believe it.
choice_data_list: Glad you got some nice rest.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I washed my cat plushie too, and now it's
fluffy as a little cloud.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's soft belly was the perfect pillow to let me
sleep like a baby.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Then I dreamed I was sleeping all snuggled up
with a real cat.
choice_data_list: So even in your dreams you're asleep...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm bursting with kitty power today. ♪
